doctrine: Every capsule is a component. The Archive is built, not collected.

roles.GUARD: permits or denies flow by rule
roles.ATTRACTOR: the fixed point — flow converges here and rests

ports.DATA: ribbon channel, eight-bit clocked, polarity neutral

capsules.name: VOID GENESIS
capsules.function: origin pulse — emits the first tick
capsules.lore: Before the Channel, only the Void. NAV-01 is the moment after.

capsules.name: EMBER FORGE
capsules.function: heat-shape — converts raw power into hardened form
capsules.lore: Where the Forge burns, the Channel takes shape.

capsules.name: JADE LATTICE
capsules.lore: Order remembers itself in the Lattice.

capsules.name: COBALT TIDELINE
capsules.function: tide-routing — moves flow along a path with phase
capsules.lore: The tide does not push. The tide arranges.

capsules.name: VIOLET ORACLE
capsules.function: symbolic divination — predicts flow from incomplete signal
capsules.lore: The Oracle sees the next tick before it arrives.

capsules.name: BONE CIPHER
capsules.function: cryptographic gate — passes only authentic flow
capsules.lore: The Cipher remembers every key it has ever seen.

capsules.name: GOLD CROWN
capsules.function: sovereign authorization — only the crown may admit a chain
capsules.lore: What the Crown does not seal, the Channel does not carry.

capsules.name: AMBER FIXED-POINT
capsules.function: the still point — every chain resolves here
capsules.lore: The fix-point is amber. The amber is the Archive.

capsules.name: IRIDESCENT NULL
capsules.function: the empty set — closes a chain, returns no signal
capsules.lore: The Null is not an absence. It is a deliberate end.

capsules.name: COBALT CELL
capsules.function: battery cell — sustained power source for a chain
capsules.lore: Power without a story is still power.

capsules.name: MERCURY CLOCK
capsules.function: precision timing — emits the canonical tick
capsules.lore: The Clock keeps the Channel honest.

capsules.name: JADE MEMORY
capsules.lore: What the Lattice contemplates, the Memory holds.

capsules.name: COPPER ANTENNA
capsules.function: fractal RF capture — turns the air into signal
capsules.lore: The sky is full of voices. The Antenna picks one.

capsules.name: ONYX VALVE
capsules.lore: Some flows are not denied. They are slowed.

capsules.name: QUARTZ LENS
capsules.function: focuses dispersed signal into a narrow beam
capsules.lore: What the Antenna gathers, the Lens decides.

capsules.name: IRON GATE
capsules.function: binary logic — AND/OR/XOR on incoming flows
capsules.lore: The Gate has only two answers. Use them well.

capsules.name: PLATINUM CONDUIT
capsules.lore: The Conduit is the Channel made literal.

capsules.name: BASALT ANCHOR
capsules.function: earth ground — sinks excess flow safely
capsules.lore: Without the Anchor, the Channel would tear itself apart.
